src/main/java/com/test/billing/infrastru._comment: GAP-1 fix: KafkaListener must import VO (Money) and Enum (OrderStatus) used in payload. Without the fix these types are used but never imported → compile error.

src/main/java/com/test/sales/domain/even._comment: Publisher domain event must have Money and OrderStatus fields.

src/main/java/com/test/sales/application._comment: Integration event must carry Money and OrderStatus with correct imports.
